Platform overview

One platform.
Six capability areas.

Governance, automation, and visibility — built as a single system where policy, workflow, and reporting share the same data model.

🛡️
Governance

Policy & Approvals

Route bookings to the right approvers before spend is committed. Configurable approval chains, exception handling, and audit-grade decision records.

Learn more
⚙️
Automation

TMC Operations

Replace manual mid-office processes with repeatable workflow logic — from client onboarding to booking intake, quality control, and notifications.

Learn more
📊
Visibility

Reporting & Visibility

Real-time, finance-grade spend reporting across every booking, approval, and exception. CFO-ready data — not another Excel export.

Learn more
🔗
Integrations

Integrations

Native connectivity to Amadeus, Sabre, Travelport, Duffel, AirGateway, and direct suppliers. No rip-and-replace — works with what you have.

Learn more
📈
Infrastructure

Performance & Scale

Cloud-native, APAC-hosted infrastructure that grows with booking volume and client complexity — without requiring a re-platform.

Learn more
🔌
API

Developer Experience

API-first design — every platform capability accessible via REST API for TMC integrations, corporate system connections, and custom extensions.

Learn more

Want to see how it fits together?

Talk to the team about how Cinturon360 can work for your TMC or travel program.

Cinturon360

The modern operating layer for travel management companies and the clients they serve. APAC-first. Globally scalable.
